// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<>));
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>, global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.TestRequest<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>>, global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity2>, global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity2>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.TestRequest<global::TestNamespace.Entity2>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.Entity2>>, global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity2>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<string>, global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<string>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.TestRequest<string>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<string>>, global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<string>>();

            return services;
        }
    }
}
